meaning: adj.<法> (作品等)淫秽的,败坏风俗的
examples: But broadcasters mustn't remove all risque humour.
The bartender says "Only if what you show me ain't risque."
Meanwhile, Madonna turned heads in a risque custom-made Givenchy corset at The Grammy Awards last month.
Malaysia's conservative Islamic party protested against Rihanna last month, saying her show is too risque for the country.
The Bob Fosse Broadway musical about a young man's coming of age was apparently too risque for Anschutz.
